spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the current CSS Color 5 alpha(from <color> / <alpha-value>) grammar for derived token transparencies, with color-mix() fallbacks before native alpha() declarations.

interactive.rationale: Color inputs now update --brand, --success, --danger, and --neutral live, and the swatches plus alert examples update from those base tokens.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The blurb describes the same alpha(from var(--token) / percentage) token derivation shown in the swatches and examples.

edge_cases.rationale: Unsupported browsers get visible color-mix() fallback swatches and alerts, plus a support note that identifies the fallback path.

references.rationale: Cites the correct ChromeStatus reference link in the 'see also' section.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to the design system, utilizing standard CSS variables and maintaining good contrast.

summary: Added live token color inputs, current alpha(from color / percentage) syntax, visible color-mix() fallback declarations, and a support note for unsupported browsers.
